release_notes: HOTFIX — updater no longer wipes %TEMP%. buildUpdaterPs1 computed cleanup as join(sourceDir, '..', '..'); when the staged ZIP had no wrapper folder, that collapsed to %TEMP% and the generated .ps1 ran Remove-Item -Recurse -Force on the entire user temp tree. Fixed: buildUpdaterPs1 now takes the run-root (tomeanty-update-<runId>) as an explicit parameter, updater.log lives at runRoot/updater.log, and the generated .ps1 only runs Remove-Item if the cleanup path matches 'tomeanty-update-'. Otherwise it logs CLEANUP REFUSED and exits.
